name: pandas
description: Data analysis and manipulation library for Python. DataFrames, time series, and powerful I/O for CSV, SQL, Excel.

name: NumPy
description: Fundamental package for numerical computing in Python. N-dimensional arrays, linear algebra, and FFT.

name: Polars
description: Blazing fast DataFrame library written in Rust with Python and Node.js bindings. Lazy evaluation and parallel execution.

name: jq
description: Lightweight command-line JSON processor. Slice, filter, map, and transform structured data with a concise syntax.

name: DuckDB
description: In-process analytical SQL database. Columnar storage, fast OLAP queries, and zero external dependencies.

name: Apache Arrow
description: Cross-language columnar memory format for flat and hierarchical data. Zero-copy reads and fast analytics across systems.

name: Datasette
description: Instant JSON API and web interface for exploring and publishing SQLite databases. Great for data journalism and analysis.

name: Apache Superset
description: Modern data exploration and visualization platform. Create interactive dashboards with SQL queries and a rich chart library.

name: Metabase
description: Open-source business intelligence tool. Ask questions about data with a visual query builder or SQL, and share dashboards.

name: Tableau
description: Visual analytics platform for business intelligence. Drag-and-drop dashboards, data blending, and interactive charts.

name: Power BI
description: Microsoft's business analytics service. Interactive visualizations, self-service BI, and integration with the Microsoft ecosystem.

name: Redash
description: Connect to any data source, query it, and visualize results. Share dashboards built from SQL queries across your team.

name: SQLAlchemy
description: Python SQL toolkit and ORM. Full power of SQL with flexible object-relational mapping and connection pooling.

name: Prisma
description: Next-generation Node.js ORM with auto-generated types, migrations, and a visual database browser (Prisma Studio).

name: GORM
description: Full-featured ORM for Go. Auto migrations, associations, hooks, and support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite.

name: Sequelize
description: Promise-based Node.js ORM for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQLite, and SQL Server. Migrations and eager loading.

name: TypeORM
description: TypeScript ORM for Node.js supporting Active Record and Data Mapper patterns. Works with most SQL databases.

name: Diesel
description: Safe, extensible ORM and query builder for Rust. Compile-time checked queries and zero-cost abstractions.

name: Drizzle ORM
description: Lightweight TypeScript ORM with a SQL-like query builder. Serverless-ready with zero dependencies and type safety.

name: SeaORM
description: Async and dynamic ORM for Rust. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite with compile-time checked queries.

name: jOOQ
description: Java ORM that generates typesafe SQL queries from your database schema. Embraces SQL rather than hiding it.

name: Exposed
description: Kotlin SQL framework with two flavors: typesafe DSL and lightweight DAO. Built by JetBrains for Kotlin-first development.

name: Django ORM
description: Built-in ORM for Django. Defines models as Python classes with migrations, querysets, and admin interface generation.

name: Pydantic
description: Data validation using Python type hints. Fast, extensible, and the backbone of FastAPI's request parsing.

name: Zod
description: TypeScript-first schema validation. Define schemas once, infer TypeScript types automatically. Zero dependencies.

name: serde
description: Rust's de facto serialization framework. Derive-based, zero-overhead support for JSON, TOML, YAML, and many more formats.

name: Joi
description: Schema description language and data validator for JavaScript. Powerful object schema validation with chained rules.

name: Ajv
description: Fast JSON Schema validator for JavaScript and TypeScript. Supports JSON Schema drafts 04 through 2020-12.

name: marshmallow
description: Python library for object serialization and deserialization. Convert complex datatypes to and from native Python types.

name: Protocol Buffers
description: Google's language-neutral data serialization format. Compact binary encoding with code generation for many languages.

name: Cerberus
description: Lightweight data validation library for Python. Schema-based with custom rules, type coercion, and normalization.

name: TypeBox
description: JSON Schema type builder for TypeScript. Creates in-memory JSON Schemas that can infer static TypeScript types.

name: Valibot
description: Modular schema validation library for TypeScript. Tree-shakeable with a tiny bundle size and Zod-like API.

name: Apache Avro
description: Row-oriented data serialization system. Schema evolution, compact binary format, and native integration with Hadoop.

name: dbt
description: Data transformation tool using SQL SELECT statements. Version-controlled models, tests, and documentation.

name: Apache Spark
description: Distributed data processing engine for batch and streaming. SQL, ML, and graph processing at cluster scale.

name: Apache Kafka
description: Distributed event streaming platform. Publish-subscribe messaging, stream processing, and durable log storage.

name: Apache Airflow
description: Workflow orchestration platform. Author, schedule, and monitor data pipelines as Python DAGs.

name: Apache Flink
description: Stateful stream processing framework. Low-latency event processing with exactly-once semantics at scale.

name: Luigi
description: Python module for building batch data pipelines. Dependency resolution, workflow management, and built-in Hadoop support.

name: Prefect
description: Modern workflow orchestration for data pipelines. Python-native with retries, scheduling, and a real-time dashboard.

name: Dagster
description: Data orchestrator for machine learning, analytics, and ETL. Software-defined assets with built-in testing and observability.

name: Temporal
description: Durable execution platform for running reliable workflows. Handles retries, timeouts, and failures automatically.

name: Apache NiFi
description: Visual dataflow system for automating data movement between systems. Drag-and-drop interface with provenance tracking.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Advanced open-source relational database. ACID, JSONB, full-text search, extensions, and strong SQL compliance.

name: MySQL
description: World's most popular open-source relational database. Powers WordPress, Shopify, and millions of web applications.

name: SQLite
description: Self-contained, serverless SQL database engine. Embedded in billions of devices. Zero configuration needed.

name: Redis
description: In-memory data structure store used as database, cache, and message broker. Sub-millisecond latency.

name: MongoDB
description: Document-oriented NoSQL database. Flexible JSON-like documents, horizontal scaling, and rich query language.

name: CockroachDB
description: Distributed SQL database built for cloud-native apps. PostgreSQL-compatible with global replication and strong consistency.

name: MariaDB
description: Community-developed MySQL fork with enhanced features. Drop-in MySQL replacement with better performance.

name: Neo4j
description: Native graph database for connected data. Cypher query language, ACID transactions, and pattern matching at scale.

name: Apache Cassandra
description: Distributed wide-column NoSQL database. Linear scalability, no single point of failure, and tunable consistency.

name: InfluxDB
description: Time series database built for high-write and query loads. Metrics, events, and IoT data with a SQL-like query language.

name: ClickHouse
description: Column-oriented OLAP database for real-time analytics. Processes billions of rows per second with SQL interface.

name: SurrealDB
description: Multi-model database combining document, graph, and relational paradigms. Single query language with real-time capabilities.

name: Elasticsearch
description: Distributed search and analytics engine. Full-text search, log analysis, and real-time indexing at scale.

name: Meilisearch
description: Fast, typo-tolerant search engine with instant results. RESTful API, easy setup, and sub-50ms responses.

name: Typesense
description: Open-source search engine optimized for instant search-as-you-type. Simple API, typo tolerance, and faceted filtering.

name: Apache Solr
description: Enterprise search platform built on Lucene. Full-text search, faceting, highlighting, and distributed indexing.

name: Algolia
description: Hosted search API for websites and mobile apps. Instant results, typo tolerance, and analytics out of the box.

name: Sonic
description: Lightweight, schema-less search backend written in Rust. Sub-millisecond ingestion and query with minimal memory footprint.

name: Manticore Search
description: Open-source database designed for search. SQL-compatible, fast full-text search, and columnar storage for analytics.

name: OpenSearch
description: Community-driven fork of Elasticsearch. Full-text search, log analytics, and observability with Apache 2.0 license.

name: ZincSearch
description: Lightweight full-text search engine written in Go. Elasticsearch-compatible API with minimal resource usage.

name: Bleve
description: Full-text search and indexing library for Go. Embeddable search with custom analyzers, facets, and highlighting.

name: Pinecone
description: Managed vector database for similarity search. Purpose-built for embeddings with real-time indexing and filtering.

name: Weaviate
description: Open-source vector database with built-in vectorization modules. Hybrid search combining vector and keyword queries.

name: Chroma
description: Open-source embedding database for AI applications. Simple API for storing, searching, and filtering vector embeddings.

name: pgvector
description: Open-source vector similarity search extension for PostgreSQL. Store embeddings alongside relational data.

name: Milvus
description: Cloud-native vector database built for scalable similarity search. Supports billion-scale vectors with GPU acceleration.

name: Qdrant
description: High-performance vector similarity search engine written in Rust. Filtering, payload storage, and on-disk indexing.

name: FAISS
description: Facebook AI library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors. GPU-accelerated nearest neighbor search.

name: LanceDB
description: Serverless vector database built on Lance columnar format. Embedded or cloud-hosted with automatic versioning.

name: Marqo
description: End-to-end vector search engine that handles embedding generation. Multimodal search for text and images out of the box.

name: Vespa
description: Open-source big data serving engine by Yahoo. Combines vector search, text search, and structured data with ML ranking at scale.

name: Vald
description: Cloud-native distributed vector search engine using the NGT algorithm. Designed for billion-scale approximate nearest neighbor search.

name: turbopuffer
description: Serverless vector and full-text search on object storage. Sub-10ms latency at scale with automatic indexing and hybrid queries.

name: Zilliz Cloud
description: Fully managed vector database built on Milvus. Enterprise-grade similarity search with multi-cloud deployment and SOC2 compliance.

name: Annoy
description: Spotify's C++ library for approximate nearest neighbor search. Memory-mapped indexes for fast read-only queries on static datasets.

name: USearch
description: Compact vector search engine supporting 10+ languages. HNSW-based with custom distance metrics and quantization for memory efficiency.

name: hnswlib
description: Header-only C++ library for fast approximate nearest neighbor search using the HNSW algorithm. Lightweight with Python bindings.

name: Deep Lake
description: Database for AI built on a columnar storage format optimized for deep learning. Stores vectors, tensors, and multimedia with versioning.

name: csvkit
description: Python CLI suite for working with CSV files. Includes csvstat, csvsql, csvlook, csvgrep, csvjoin, in2csv, and more for slicing, querying, and converting tabular data.

name: qsv
description: Ultra-fast CSV CLI toolkit in Rust (successor to xsv). Index, slice, search, join, stats, frequency, and transform CSV files at high speed.

name: Miller (mlr)
description: Like awk, sed, and cut for name-indexed data (CSV, TSV, JSON, XTAB). Stream-processes structured data with verbs for sort, filter, join, stats, and reshape.

name: Flyway
description: Java-based database migration tool using plain SQL scripts. Version-controlled, convention-over-configuration approach popular in enterprise Java and Spring Boot projects.

name: Liquibase
description: Java-based database schema change management tool. Supports changesets in XML, SQL, YAML, and JSON with rollback, diff, and database-agnostic abstractions.

name: Alembic
description: Lightweight database migration tool for SQLAlchemy. Auto-generates migration scripts from model changes with branching and merging support.

name: Django Migrations
description: Built-in migration system for the Django web framework. Auto-detects model changes, generates migration files, and handles schema evolution with squashing and dependency tracking.

name: Rails ActiveRecord Migrations
description: Built-in migration system for Ruby on Rails. DSL for defining schema changes in Ruby with versioning, rollback, and database-agnostic column types.

name: Knex.js Migrations
description: Migration system built into the Knex.js SQL query builder for Node.js. JavaScript/TypeScript migration files with up/down functions, seed data support, and multi-database compatibility.

name: Prisma Migrate
description: Declarative migration system for Prisma ORM. Generates SQL migrations from schema changes with shadow database diffing, migration history, and team collaboration support.

name: TypeORM Migrations
description: Migration system for TypeORM. Auto-generates migrations from entity changes, supports up/down functions, and integrates with the TypeORM CLI for running and reverting migrations.

name: Sequelize CLI
description: Command-line interface for Sequelize ORM migrations and seed management. Generates migration and model boilerplate with up/down functions for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and MSSQL.

name: golang-migrate
description: Database-agnostic migration tool written in Go. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, CockroachDB, and more with CLI and Go library interfaces. Pure SQL migration files.

name: dbmate
description: Lightweight, framework-agnostic database migration tool written in Go. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and ClickHouse with plain SQL migrations and a simple CLI.

name: Atlas
description: Modern database schema management tool by Ariga. Declarative and versioned migration workflows, schema inspection, drift detection, and CI/CD integration for any database.

name: Sqitch
description: Database-agnostic change management system. Dependency-based ordering, no ORM required, native SQL scripts, and support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Oracle, Firebird, and more.

name: Goose
description: Database migration tool for Go. Supports SQL and Go migration functions, embedding migrations in binaries, and works with PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and more.

name: Umzug
description: Framework-agnostic migration tool for Node.js. Pluggable storage backends, TypeScript support, and programmatic API. Powers Sequelize CLI's migration system under the hood.
